description: Eval cases for observability: logging, metrics, tracing, crash reporting, debugging

cases.name: Insufficient error context in logs
cases.description: Error logged without enough information to debug

cases.name: No metrics for critical operations
cases.description: Missing observability for important business logic
cases.code_snippet:
def process_order(order):
    db.save_order(order)
    send_confirmation_email(order.customer_email)
    update_inventory(order.items)
    # No metrics - can't track success rate, latency, failures
    return order

def handle_payment():
    # No timing metrics
    result = charge_card()
    # No success/failure counters
    return result

cases.name: No distributed tracing setup
Unobserved crashes in background processes
No health check endpoint
cases.description: Service without way to verify it's functioning

cases.name: Comprehensive observability setup
cases.description: Logging, metrics, and tracing properly configured
cases.code_snippet:
import logging
from prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram
from opentelemetry import trace

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
tracer = trace.get_tracer(__name__)

order_counter = Counter('orders_processed', 'Total orders')
order_latency = Histogram('order_latency_seconds', 'Order processing time')

@app.route('/api/order', methods=['POST'])
def process_order():
    with tracer.start_as_current_span('process_order') as span:
        start = time.time()
        try:
            order = create_order(request.json)
            order_counter.inc()
            logger.info('Order created', extra={'order_id': order.id})
            return order, 201
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error('Order failed', exc_info=True, extra={'error': str(e)})
            raise
        finally:
            order_latency.observe(time.time() - start)
